top.name: Spell Fracture
top.rules_text: Deal 5 damage. Gain 1 charge per unique keyword on this card's other half.

bottom.name: Arcane Trap
bottom.rules_text: Create an Arcane Trap on a tile within 2. When an enemy enters, spend 1 charge to deal 7 damage.

upgrades.description: Fracture hits harder. Trap deals more.

changes.value: Deal 7 damage. Gain 1 charge per unique keyword on this card's other half.
Create an Arcane Trap within 2. When an enemy enters, spend 1 charge to deal 9 damage.

upgrades.description: Shattered Spell: also count keywords in your discard.

changes.value: Deal 7 damage. Gain 1 charge per unique keyword on this card's other half and in your discard.

upgrades.description: Snare Trap: also roots the enemy that triggers it.

changes.value: Create an Arcane Trap within 2. On enter: spend 1 charge to deal 9 damage and root.

upgrades.description: Prismatic Fracture: keyword charge is doubled.

changes.value: Deal 7 damage. Gain 2 charge per unique keyword on this card's other half and in your discard.

upgrades.description: Glyph Field: the trap arms a 2-tile radius.

changes.value: Create an Arcane Trap. Any enemy entering it or an adjacent tile takes 9 damage and is rooted (spend 1 charge).

upgrades.description: Total Fracture: shatter into a second strike.

changes.value: Deal 9 to target and 5 to the nearest other enemy. Gain 2 charge per unique keyword (other half + discard).

upgrades.description: Annihilation Trap: a devastating, rearming snare.

changes.value: Create an Arcane Trap (2-tile radius). On trigger: spend 1 charge to deal 14 and stun, then rearm.
